name: github-notifier-pro
description: A Chrome extension that brings GitHub notifications right to your browser

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/github-notifier-pro-chrome.zip manifest.json src/ images/ -x '*.DS_Store' '*.git*' '*node_modules*' '*.md' && cp manifest-firefox.json manifest.json && zip -r dist/github-notifier-pro-firefox.zip manifest.json src/ images/ -x '*.DS_Store' '*.git*' '*node_modules*' '*.md' && git checkout manifest.json && echo '✨ Build complete! Chrome & Firefox packages in dist/'
scripts.dev:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox-dev && mkdir -p dist/firefox-dev && cp manifest-firefox.json dist/firefox-dev/manifest.json && cp -r src dist/firefox-dev/ && cp -r images dist/firefox-dev/ && echo '🦊 Firefox dev environment ready at dist/firefox-dev/'

author: euxx
